  %slot5 = alloca { ptr, i64 }
  store { ptr, i64 } %arg0, ptr %slot0
  br label %bb0

bb0:

  %invoke1 = call %evid.yield.map_require_nonempty$Text$Int @evid$map_require_nonempty$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %load0)

  %unpack5 = load { ptr, i64 }, ptr %unpack.slot4
  %unpack.slot6 = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } %ext3, ptr %unpack.slot6
  %unpack7 = load %evid.type.MapCardinalityFailure, ptr %unpack.slot6
  switch i8 %ext2, label %bb.trap.2 [
    i8 0, label %bb.invoke.ok.0
    i8 1, label %bb.invoke.fail.1
  ]

bb1:
  %load8 = load { ptr, i64 }, ptr %slot2
  store { ptr, i64 } %load8, ptr %slot4
  %load9 = load { ptr, i64 }, ptr %slot4

  store { ptr, i64 } %call10, ptr %slot5
  store i64 5, ptr %slot1
  br label %bb3

  %ext12 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapCardinalityFailure %load11, 0
  switch i32 %ext12, label %bb.trap.3 [
    i32 0, label %bb4
  ]

  %load13 = load i64, ptr %slot1
  ret i64 %load13

  store i64 7, ptr %slot1
  br label %bb3

  store { ptr, i64 } %unpack5, ptr %slot2

  ret i64 %load19

define %evid.yield.map_require_nonempty$Text$Int @evid$map_require_nonempty$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0) {
entry:
  %count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %is_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %count0, 0
  br i1 %is_empty0, label %empty, label %nonempty

nonempty:
  %ok.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_require_nonempty$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  store { ptr, i64 } %arg0, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_require_nonempty$Text$Int %ok.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %ok.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_require_nonempty$Text$Int %ok.value

empty:
  %reason0 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapCardinalityFailure zeroinitializer, i32 0, 0
  %fail.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_require_nonempty$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 1, 0
  %fail.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  store %evid.type.MapCardinalityFailure %reason0, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_require_nonempty$Text$Int %fail.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %fail.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_require_nonempty$Text$Int %fail.value
}

define %evid.yield.list_require_nonempty$Int @evid$list_require_nonempty$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0) {
entry:
  %count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %is_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %count0, 0
  br i1 %is_empty0, label %empty, label %nonempty

nonempty:
  %ok.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.list_require_nonempty$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  store { ptr, i64 } %arg0, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.list_require_nonempty$Int %ok.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %ok.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.list_require_nonempty$Int %ok.value

empty:
  %reason0 = insertvalue %evid.type.ListCardinalityFailure zeroinitializer, i32 1, 0
  %fail.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.list_require_nonempty$Int zeroinitializer, i8 1, 0
  %fail.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  store %evid.type.ListCardinalityFailure %reason0, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.list_require_nonempty$Int %fail.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %fail.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.list_require_nonempty$Int %fail.value
}
